narrative:
North Olmsted-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,169 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.1 percentage points.
